comment.body:
yeah, it comes down to read the post carefully. 
Alma lays out levels and that has to be broken for continuation. 
I remember back in April that she even wrote that we may go down to 4200. But the keyword was 'may'
Very bad stuff had to happen to make us go down there. 
As today's intraday post. She made a clear pivot at 6308. If that is broken we may go even as high as 6450. but I think some people only see the big numbers and don't read the if's and buts
